mapper.select:
select setmeal_id from setmeal_dish where dish_id in
#{dishId}
mapper.delete:
delete from dish where id in
#{id}
mapper.update:
update dish
name=#{name},
price=#{price},
image=#{image},
description= #{description},
status= #{status},
category_id= #{categoryId},
update_time= #{updateTime},
update_user= #{updateUser},
where id=#{id}
